dashboardia.title: DashboardIA LLM
dashboardia.description: Operational technical-support hub that centralizes a personal knowledge base, file resources (PDF, Excel, video), calendar, notes, and an AI assistant with file attachments. All data is fully isolated per authenticated Supabase user, and includes a Windows agent for remote PowerShell script execution.

invoiceapp.title: InvoiceApp
invoiceapp.description: Comprehensive billing and collection management system for contractors and freelancers with legally valid digital signature, detailed status tracking, and a quick onboarding setup assistant.

pcm.title: Compliance Platform (PCM)
pcm.description: Robust system for managing commitments and government regulatory compliance. Implements CQRS architecture with MediatR and advanced authentication for maximum security and scalability.

solucionesjs.title: Soluciones Integrales JS
solucionesjs.description: Custom corporate portal and CMS for the industrial sector. Includes interactive 3D scene visualization using React Three Fiber and comprehensive management of projects and services.

gargurevichdev.title: Gargurevich.Dev
gargurevichdev.description: Professional technology consulting website focused on software architecture and modern web development. Developed with Angular 17 and optimized for maximum speed and SEO.

house.title: House SaaS
house.description: Multi-tenant SaaS for property and condominium management with 5 distinct roles (superadmin, admin, owner, tenant, maintenance), role-based responsive sidebars, and centralized REST API.

lumic.title: Lumic App
lumic.description: Full-stack e-commerce monorepo with Next.js 15 / React 19 frontend and ASP.NET Core .NET 9 backend in layered architecture. JWT Bearer authentication and ready for Azure deployment.
